name: Google: View Image [JTY]
description: Adds a 'View Image' button to Google Images results. Privacy-first: no tracking, no external requests, no data collection. Created by iterating with Claude on Feb 23, 2026. How it works: This extension only activates on Google Images pages. When you click a search result and the preview panel appears, it reads the image URL that Google already loaded in the page, strips resize parameters to get the full-resolution version, and places a clickable 'View image' link next to the existing 'Visit' button. That link opens the actual image file in a new tab. Nothing is collected, stored, or sent anywhere.
author: Jeff Y via Claude
